environment.workload_note: Same container and installed dependencies; three cold subprocess runs per import/copy measurement. Streamlit health startup is one run per build.

copy_serializer_20_short_full_pairs.note: Direct serializer microbenchmark only. The repaired UI caches payloads by canonical identity, so normal reruns do not repeat this builder workload; that call-avoidance was verified by code/tests but not assigned an unmeasured speedup.

streamlit_health_start.note: Single-run smoke timing; insufficient for a broad performance claim.

claims.interpretation: Measurements are close and noisy. No material percentage improvement is claimed. The changes primarily reduce avoidable work through lazy routing, optional dependency isolation, and generation-keyed payload reuse.
